summary:
The effectiveness of ART under "test and treat" policies is well-supported by data, but major systemic barriers—including weak healthcare infrastructure, drug shortages, stigma, and low patient engagement—in Sub-Saharan Africa limit feasible implementation. Thus, coping with this shift requires targeted investments beyond mere availability of treatment. 

The summary above was generated using only information from Agent1’s response; no external knowledge or assumptions were added.
